subtasks.description: Retrieve AWS contract commitment levels (reserved instances, savings plans, compute commitments) from contract management system with effective dates and commitment amounts
Query AWS spend data from cost warehouse for the same time periods as commitments, aggregated by service/instance type to match commitment granularity

Reconcile committed vs actual spend data; calculate utilization ratios, identify overcommitted segments (commitment > spend + buffer) and underutilized segments (spend << commitment); generate posture classification and recommendations for commitment rebalancing

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks minimum: (1) mongo_query to fetch commitment metadata from contract system (mid tier for multi-field filtering and date logic), (2) sql_gen to aggregate spend by matching dimensions (mid tier for multi-table joins and time windowing), (3) cross_recon (frontier tier) to reconcile two data streams, compute utilization metrics, classify overcommitment/underutilization patterns, and generate recommendations—this is the complex analytical decision layer that requires inference across signals. No policy_action needed as this is analytical posture assessment, not governance approval. No multitool_plan as the query does not request tool registry orchestration.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS actual_spend, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS active_licenses, AVG(daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'usage' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS usage_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'commitment' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS committed_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'usage' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'commitment' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS variance, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'commitment' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'usage' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'commitment' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END), 2) ELSE NULL END AS utilization_pct FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'AWS' GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year DESC, fiscal_quarter DESC, publisher, product
